candidates.description: Provides detailed information on various photo camera films in 35mm and 120 formats including brand name, film model, ISO, availability in different formats, black & white or color specification, processing type, image, film description, and key features.

candidates.name: FinSignals API
candidates.description: The FinSignals API provides a RESTful interface for classifying financial social posts, including text from platforms like Reddit. It evaluates a post's sentiment, directionality, content quality, and other relevant signals in a structured JSON response.

candidates.name: Final Space API
candidates.description: An API based on the animated television show Final Space, providing data such as character info obtained from the Final Space wiki. The API returns data in a friendly JSON format.

candidates.name: Financial Data API
candidates.description: This API provides access to a wide range of financial data including market data, company fundamentals, and alternative data. Users can make requests to retrieve stock symbols, prices, company information, ESG scores and ratings, mutual fund holdings, and more. The data covers thousands of securities including stocks, ETFs, funds, and commodities.

candidates.name: Flyff Game API
candidates.description: All Game Data from Flyff

candidates.name: Food Hygiene Rating API
candidates.description: The UK Food Hygiene Rating Data API provides access to food hygiene ratings issued to various food establishments across the UK. It allows users to obtain data in XML and JSON formats, featuring geolocation details for businesses inspected by local authorities.

candidates.name: Football Data API
candidates.description: The Football Data API provides comprehensive access to football (soccer) statistics and information. It includes data on areas, competitions, teams, matches, standings, scorers, and players. Perfect for building sports apps or platforms.

candidates.name: Footer Year Update
candidates.description: This API automatically retrieves the current year for website footers, eliminating the need for manual updates each January. Designed for developers, it ensures that the displayed year is accurate and up to date, improving user experience while saving time and resources.

candidates.name: Foreign Exchange Rates
candidates.description: The exchangerate.dev API provides indicative foreign exchange rates for over 168 currency pairs, with live intraday updates for 16 currencies. It offers various endpoints for real-time currency conversion, historical rates, and detailed market information, making it ideal for developers needing accurate financial data.

candidates.name: Forex Trading API
candidates.description: The Forex Trading API allows users to access the foreign exchange market for trading currencies and precious metals. It facilitates trading over 80 currency pairs with comprehensive trading options and insights into market performance.

candidates.name: Fortnite API
candidates.description: The Fortnite API provides a wealth of data related to the popular battle royale game, including player statistics, cosmetics, daily shop items, news updates, and various game modes. It is updated automatically with each game patch to ensure the information is current and accurate, making it an essential resource for developers and gamers alike.

candidates.name: ForzaMusic API
candidates.description: The ForzaMusic API provides access to a massive collection of over 50 million songs, along with detailed metadata such as lyrics and album information. It enables developers to create engaging music applications with features like smart search, analytics, and lightning-fast response times.

candidates.name: Free Birds API
candidates.description: The Free Birds API offers accessible endpoints to retrieve and manage various bird data ideal for development purposes. It supports multiple features including searching, sorting, and limiting results, making it a versatile tool for testing and integration in applications.

candidates.name: Free Elevation API
candidates.description: This API provides access to elevation data for any point on Earth without any cost. Users can retrieve elevation information by making GET requests with latitude and longitude parameters.

candidates.name: Free IP API
candidates.description: The Free IP API provides fast and reliable geolocation information for IP addresses, including details like country, city, region, and more. It is available for both commercial and non-commercial usage and supports multiple formats such as JSON and XML.

candidates.name: Free Jobs API
candidates.description: The Free Jobs API provides access to a comprehensive database of job listings across various industries. It allows users to retrieve job details, including title, location, salary, and requirements, helping candidates find suitable employment opportunities.

candidates.name: Free Meal API
candidates.description: Provides access to a free recipe API with features like searching meals by name, listing meals by first letter, looking up meal details by ID, and more. Supports JSON format data retrieval.

candidates.name: Free Movie API
candidates.description: This API provides access to a wide range of movie and series information without requiring API keys. Users can fetch detailed movie data, including titles, genres, and descriptions efficiently and for free.

candidates.name: Free Music API
candidates.description: TheAudioDB provides a free music API to use in test or development environments.

candidates.name: Free Public APIs
candidates.description: This API provides access to a collection of 489 free public APIs that are valuable for students and developers alike. Each API is tested daily to ensure reliability and accuracy.

candidates.name: Free Sports API
candidates.description: Provides free JSON sports API for accessing basic sports data, including information on teams, players, events, and more. Offers test API keys, API limits, and upgrade options for premium features.

candidates.name: Free Store API
candidates.description: The Store API is a dynamic REST API designed to simulate a real-world e-commerce backend. It allows developers to practice full-stack integration by handling features like JWT authentication, product filtering, persistent shopping carts, user profiles, and order flows. Unlike static mock APIs, it maintains session-based data changes, making it ideal for building and testing realistic frontend applications without needing to set up a custom backend.

candidates.name: Free UV Index API
candidates.description: Provides real-time UV Index and 5 day Hourly UV Index Forecast globally without API Key. Single endpoint for current UV Index and forecast based on latitude/longitude.

candidates.name: FreeTestAPI
candidates.description: FreeTestAPI provides over 25 dummy APIs to streamline the process of API testing for developers. It allows users to access mock data for various applications, ensuring seamless workflow integration.

candidates.name: French Address API
candidates.description: Official French address validation service. It provides endpoints for both forward and reverse geocoding, as well as the ability to perform batch geocoding from CSV files.

candidates.name: Fried Apps API
candidates.description: The Fried Apps API allows users to generate temporary email addresses with just one click. It enables users to receive emails directly in their browser toolbar without the need for sign-up.

candidates.name: FunisGo Streaming API
candidates.description: The FunisGo API provides a secure and structured way to access streaming content such as movies, series, and channels. It features both free and premium plans, with various usage limits and capabilities for content creation and editing for premium users.

candidates.name: Game Data API

candidates.name: Gemini API
candidates.description: The Gemini API provides developers with tools to leverage advanced AI models for content generation, including text, images, audio, and more. It enables seamless integration for creating applications that utilize state-of-the-art multimodal capabilities.

candidates.name: GeoAdmin Search API
candidates.description: This API allows users to search for locations, layers, or features using either text search or bounding box parameters. It supports three types of searches: location search, layer search, and feature search, enabling comprehensive data retrieval from the Swiss national geographic database.

candidates.name: GeoDescription API
candidates.description: This API provides a service for reverse geocoding, converting geographic coordinates into human-readable address-like location descriptions. Users can access this functionality for both free and paid usage, accommodating various commercial needs.

candidates.name: GeoNet API
candidates.description: The GeoNet API allows developers to run common network tools from servers located around the world, facilitating the identification of network behavior based on user region. It includes functionalities like GeoPing for latency measurement and GeoDNS for DNS record lookups.

candidates.name: Geonode API
candidates.description: The Geonode API enables ethical data collection for the modern web, allowing developers to utilize scalable proxies and APIs for any target while offering expert support throughout the process. With tools designed for efficient data management and retrieval, this API is ideal for developers looking to integrate data collection seamlessly into their applications.

candidates.name: GitHub Error API
candidates.description: This API provides details about errors encountered while accessing GitHub pages, including suggestions for resolving the issue. It also gives access to localized strings and error codes for better user understanding and navigation.

candidates.name: GitHub Project Issues
candidates.description: This API allows you to retrieve issues associated with a specific GitHub repository using the owner's username and the repository name. It supports queries to get detailed information about different issues for improved project management.

candidates.name: GitHub REST API
candidates.description: The GitHub REST API allows developers to create integrations, retrieve data, and automate workflows on the GitHub platform. It provides access to various functionalities, enabling interaction with repositories, issues, pull requests, and user accounts among others.

candidates.name: GitHub Website API
candidates.description: This API provides information about the GitHub website, specifically the status of the site, including any downtime or errors that may occur. It offers suggestions based on error codes and potential solutions to users experiencing issues accessing the site.

candidates.name: Give Food API
candidates.description: This API provides access to the largest public database of food banks in the UK, including details about their locations and the items they need donated. Users can retrieve this data in various formats such as JSON, GeoJSON, XML, or YAML, facilitating numerous applications in addressing food insecurity.

candidates.name: Glax Weather API
candidates.description: This API provides current weather data for a specified location, presenting information visually through Glax. Users can retrieve data in JSON or PNG formats and customize their queries with parameters like location, units, and forecast options.

candidates.name: Global Shark Attack API
candidates.description: The Global Shark Attack File (GSAF) API offers access to a comprehensive dataset of human-shark interactions, including detailed incident reports categorized by type, such as unprovoked, provoked, boat-related, war-related, and questionable incidents. Users can explore bite patterns, species identification, and circumstances surrounding shark encounters, providing valuable insights for researchers, enthusiasts, and conservationists interested in understanding shark behavior and the rarity of shark attacks.

candidates.name: Grass Touch API
candidates.description: This API provides information about whether Kim has touched grass or not. It also includes details about the last known status and message regarding Kim's outdoor activity.

candidates.name: Gregorian Lunar Calendar
candidates.description: This API provides conversion between Gregorian and Lunar dates. Users can fetch the Lunar date corresponding to a specified Gregorian date through a simple query.

candidates.name: Guild Wars 2 API
candidates.description: The Guild Wars 2 API is an interface that allows third-party applications to access game data from the Guild Wars 2 servers. It provides various endpoints for retrieving information about achievements, account details, items, and more, enabling developers to create applications that enhance the gaming experience.

candidates.name: HTML Creator API
candidates.description: The HTML Creator API allows users to create and edit HTML code with an intuitive interface, supporting advanced JavaScript functionality. It is designed for web developers looking for a user-friendly tool that streamlines coding tasks and enhances productivity with features like keyboard shortcuts and code sharing.

candidates.name: HTML to PDF Converter
candidates.description: This API allows users to convert any HTML source code into a downloadable PDF file. It is a free service that requires no authentication and can be easily integrated into applications using a simple HTTP POST request.

candidates.name: HackerNews API
candidates.description: Provides public Hacker News data in near real time. Accessible via Firebase client libraries for Android, iOS, and web. Includes information on stories, comments, jobs, Ask HNs, polls, and users.

candidates.name: Harry Potter API
candidates.description: API providing data on Harry Potter characters and spells. Includes routes for all characters, specific character by ID, Hogwarts students and staff, characters in a house, and all spells.

candidates.name: Heat Stress Warning API

candidates.name: Hello as Service
candidates.description: This API allows developers to greet visitors in their native language by utilizing their IP address or browser language settings. By making a simple API call, you can receive localized greetings based on the user's location or language preferences.

candidates.name: Hiking Trail Closures
candidates.description: This API provides up-to-date information about closures and diversions of hiking trails as well as cycle and mountain bike routes in Switzerland. Data is updated daily and presented in a standardized format for developers to integrate into their applications.

candidates.name: Homepage Screenshot API
candidates.description: This API provides fast and efficient screenshots of specified web pages. Users can request screenshots for various dates, sizes, and formats, making it ideal for web monitoring and analysis.

candidates.name: Hong Kong CSDI
candidates.description: The Hong Kong CSDI Portal provides access to a range of geospatial data and applications aimed at supporting data sharing and government initiatives. It centralizes resources for spatial data, making it easier for users to find and utilize geographic information.

candidates.name: Hypixel API
candidates.description: Official Hypixel API documentation for accessing player data, game information, resources, and more. Requires API key for authentication and has rate limits for requests.

candidates.name: Hyrule Compendium API

candidates.name: IIN Lookup API

candidates.name: INNO_CYBER Authentication

candidates.name: IP Address API

candidates.name: IP Address Lookup

candidates.name: IP Data API

The API is designed for both developers and businesses, offering a user-friendly interface with a generous free tier for basic usage.

candidates.name: IP Geo Currency API

candidates.name: Mentality Skill Training

candidates.name: MySQL Visual Explain
candidates.description: This API provides a visualization tool that helps users understand and optimize their MySQL queries through easy-to-read graphical outputs. It transforms the cryptic output of MySQL's EXPLAIN command into interactive graphics, assisting users in identifying performance issues and understanding complex query plans.

candidates.name: NDBC Buoy Data API
candidates.description: Description: Access real-time buoy readings and information from the National Data Buoy Center (NDBC) with this API. Currently under development, it provides essential data for ocean and weather monitoring enthusiasts and professionals. Supports various content types, including JSON, XML, CSV, and HTML. Ideal for integrating buoy data into your applications or research projects.

candidates.name: NEXARDA API
candidates.description: The NEXARDA API provides access to a video game price comparison service, allowing users to find deals from over 90 approved retailers. It enables developers to integrate price checks for video games, consoles, and gaming gear directly into their applications without requiring authentication.

candidates.name: NHL API Documentation
candidates.description: This API provides access to various publicly available statistics and information from the NHL, aimed at making complex data easily digestible for developers and stats enthusiasts. The documentation includes details about different endpoints, usage examples, and guidelines for contributions.

candidates.name: NID Application System
candidates.description: The Bangladesh NID Application System API allows users to register for a national identity card, claim their accounts, and manage related services through a web-based platform. It provides functionalities for document uploads and information retrieval while ensuring user authentication and approval processes.

candidates.name: NID Correction Portal
candidates.description: This API provides a platform for users to manage and review National ID (NID) correction requests. Users can log in, search for requests, view details, approve or reject applications, and track status updates. It is designed specifically for authorized officials of the Bangladesh Election Commission.

candidates.name: NPM Registry API
candidates.description: API for accessing package metadata from the NPM registry . Allows retrieval of package information, versions, and search functionality with detailed response formats.

candidates.name: NPPES NPI Registry
candidates.description: The NPPES API provides a real-time alternative to accessing NPPES public data, allowing users to retrieve detailed information about healthcare providers using their National Provider Identifier (NPI). Unlike the traditional method of batch downloads, this API facilitates faster and more efficient queries for provider data. The API currently operates with version 2.1, enhancing accessibility and ease of use.

candidates.name: Naruto Character API
candidates.description: The NarutoDB API offers a detailed database of characters, clans, villages, and more from the Naruto anime and manga series. Users can access comprehensive information about each character, including their traits, jutsus, and affiliations, making it a valuable resource for fans and developers alike.

candidates.name: Nationalize API
candidates.description: A simple API that estimates the nationality of a person based on a last name.

candidates.name: Navalnyarchive API
candidates.description: This API provides access to the content from navalny.com, including blogs, social media, projects, and photographs associated with Alexei Navalny. It allows developers to programmatically interact with the stored content.

candidates.name: Nebulum Mars Rovers API
candidates.description: Access real-time photos taken by Mars rovers Perseverance and Curiosity through NASA missions. Developers can retrieve images based on unique photo IDs, Earth dates, or Martian sols. This API offers efficient access to fascinating Mars exploration data for enthusiasts and researchers.

candidates.name: Nekosia Neko API
candidates.description: Nekosia is a free API designed for integrating anime content, specifically featuring cute Neko images. It includes a dedicated Booru for browsing and adding images, enhancing project content with a variety of anime themes.

candidates.name: Neugeborenen Vornamen Kanton St.Gallen
candidates.description: Provides dataset of newborn first names in the Canton of St.Gallen since 1987, based on official registry data from the Federal Office for Civil Status. Names with less than five occurrences per year are grouped under 'other names' for privacy reasons.

candidates.name: News Public API
candidates.description: This API provides access to the latest news articles, allowing users to fetch and retrieve news data programmatically. It is built using Python REST Framework and is available for public use.

candidates.name: Nextbike API
candidates.description: Nextbike Bikesharing API

candidates.name: No-as-a-Service
candidates.description: This API provides random, creative, and humorous rejection reasons for various scenarios where a graceful decline is necessary. With a simple GET request, users can retrieve a witty response formatted in JSON. It's designed to add a touch of humor while saying 'no'.

candidates.name: Novaya Gazeta API
candidates.description: This API provides news, analytics, expert opinions, special reports, and journalistic investigations related to Russia, Ukraine, and Europe from novayagazeta.eu and novayagazeta.ru. It allows users to access various media content and updates in real-time.

candidates.name: Official Joke API
candidates.description: This API provides a collection of jokes and allows users to retrieve random jokes or jokes by type. It supports various endpoints to fetch single or multiple jokes, making it easy to add humor to applications or projects.

candidates.name: Ogli Link Shortener
candidates.description: The Ogli API allows users to create and manage short links with customizable Open Graph meta tags for optimal social media previews. It provides endpoints for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting links, as well as accessing link statistics for performance tracking.

candidates.name: Oktias Bakery API
candidates.description: This API provides functionality for an online bakery store, enabling users to browse products, place orders, and manage a shopping cart. It is designed to streamline the shopping experience for cakes and pastries, integrating with backend services for inventory and transaction management.

candidates.name: Oldest People Records API
candidates.description: This API provides information about the oldest living person and the oldest person ever recorded. It manages local data, allowing updates and constraints such as birth date limits and country of origin.

candidates.name: One Piece API
candidates.description: Access information about the One Piece manga, including sagas, fruits, chapters, volumes, episodes, and more. Explore details about characters, crews, locations, and various elements from the One Piece world.

candidates.name: Open Data Hub API
candidates.description: The Open Data Hub API provides programmatic access to various datasets and resources. It allows users to retrieve, submit, and manage data related to domains such as mobility and tourism efficiently.

candidates.name: Open Government Portal
candidates.description: This API allows users to search and access datasets from the Government of Canada. It facilitates learning how to work with datasets and provides insights into how government data has been utilized.

candidates.name: Open-Elevation API
candidates.description: Open-Elevation is a free and open-source elevation API that provides elevation data for geographical points. Users can easily access elevation information over a broad dataset, offering a reliable alternative to commercial elevation services.

candidates.name: OpenAQ Platform
candidates.description: Largest open-source air quality data platform aggregating historical and real-time air quality data globally.

candidates.name: OpenF1 Car Data
candidates.description: Provides real-time and historical Formula 1 car data at a sample rate of about 3.7 Hz, including lap timings, car telemetry, and more.

candidates.name: OpenMercantil API
candidates.description: This API provides open access to the Spanish Mercantile Registry Bulletin (BORME) data, enabling users to search for companies and individuals, retrieve detailed reports, and analyze business activities without requiring authentication. It supports a wide array of endpoints for searching, exporting data, and retrieving various statistics related to companies and their associated events.

candidates.name: OpenRouter Models
candidates.description: This API allows users to browse various models available on the OpenRouter platform. It provides functionalities for users to access model details, compare different models, and explore their features and capabilities.

candidates.name: OpenSanctum API
candidates.description: OpenSanctum API provides detailed information about various places of worship and religious traditions around the world. It is designed for users interested in exploring sacred sites, spiritual practices, and diverse faiths globally.

candidates.name: Openverse API
candidates.description: Openverse is a search engine for openly-licensed media. The Openverse API enables programmatic access to public domain digital media, allowing developers to integrate and utilize a vast collection of openly-licensed works including articles, songs, videos, and images in their applications.

candidates.name: PageSpeed API
candidates.description: Runs PageSpeed analysis on a specified URL, providing scores, suggestions for faster loading, and other data. Supports different categories, locales, and strategies.

candidates.name: Parkhaus Basel API
candidates.description: Provides minute-by-minute occupancy data for public parking garages in Basel, Switzerland, sourced from the RSS feed of the Basel parking guidance system.

candidates.name: Parking St.Gallen
candidates.description: Allows searching and downloading parking records in Stadt St.Gallen with various parameters. Data includes parking locations, availability, occupancy, and more.

candidates.name: Parkleitsystem API
candidates.description: Provides real-time information on available parking spaces in connected parking garages in cities like Basel, Zurich, Bern, Luzern, St.Gallen, and Zug. Developed by Simon Jenny for the Pebble.Parking-App.

candidates.name: Parlament Open Data
candidates.description: Provides machine-readable data on parliamentary activities in Switzerland.

candidates.name: Passantenfrequenz Stadt St.Gallen
candidates.description: Measures pedestrian traffic in St. Gallen, showing the number of pedestrians passing by a sensor on Vadianstrasse.

candidates.name: Passantenfrequenzen Zürich
candidates.description: Dieses API ermöglicht den Zugriff auf Daten zu Passantenfrequenzen an verschiedenen Standorten in Zürich. Die Messungen werden stündlich aktualisiert und umfassen Informationen über die Anzahl der Passanten, unterteilt nach Zonen, Geschlecht und Laufrichtung sowie Wetterdaten.

candidates.name: Peremen API
candidates.description: The Peremen API enables integration with the peremen.app browser extension, offering a seamless connection and secure access to Russian services. It facilitates various operations, including user authentication and session management, while ensuring privacy and security for its users.

candidates.name: PhantomJsCloud API
candidates.description: PhantomJsCloud API offers a REST-like, JSON-based interface for web page rendering and automation. It allows you to submit page requests and receive various output formats like JPEG, PNG, and PDF while handling page interactions via an automation API.

candidates.name: Phish.in API
candidates.description: Phish.in provides a JSON API for accessing an extensive archive of live Phish audience recordings. It supports various functionalities including retrieving data on shows, songs, venues, and playlists, with options for sorting and pagination.

candidates.name: Phone Number Validator
candidates.description: This API validates phone numbers, providing details such as the local and international format. It identifies the country, carrier, and line type for the given number, ensuring accurate communication.

candidates.name: Placar Agora
candidates.description: Placar Agora provides live scores, final results, and upcoming game schedules for sports enthusiasts. It allows users to follow their favorite teams and view real-time updates on various matches.

candidates.name: Placeholder Image API
candidates.description: Provides downloadable placeholder images with caching capabilities. Users can fetch a binary image or a plain text URL based on specific keywords.

candidates.name: Playstation Store API
candidates.description: This API allows users to access game information and related services from the Playstation Store. Users can query details about games, including regional availability, language settings, and various content types.

candidates.name: PoetryDB API
candidates.description: An API for internet poets to access and retrieve poetry data. Users can search for poems by title, author, lines, line count, and more, and receive the results in JSON format.

candidates.name: Pogony API
candidates.description: The Pogony API provides access to the registry of officers in the Russian army who have committed various crimes against their soldiers, including assaults and extortion. It allows users to retrieve a list of known offenders along with relevant details related to their actions.

candidates.name: Pokefact API
candidates.description: API chooses a random Pokemon fact and displays it to the user.

candidates.name: Pokemon3D API
candidates.description: The Pokemon3D API provides access to 3D models of Pokémon, enabling developers to easily integrate and display interactive Pokémon models within their applications. This API is specifically designed for use with the Pokemon3D project on GitHub, offering a variety of endpoints to retrieve 3D model data for different Pokémon forms, including regular, shiny, Alolan, and more.

candidates.name: Pollinations AI
candidates.description: Pollinations AI is an open-source platform providing simple text and image generation APIs without the need for sign-ups or API keys. It emphasizes user privacy and encourages creative exploration with AI-generated content.

candidates.name: Pony API
candidates.description: The Pony API provides access to detailed information about characters, episodes, songs, and comics from the animated series My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic. This RESTful API allows users to search for data by various attributes, making it an essential tool for fans and developers alike.

candidates.name: Profanity Checker API
candidates.description: Check text for profanity (filter out bad words)

candidates.name: Profanity Filter API
candidates.description: PurgoMalum is a free RESTful web service that filters and removes profanity and unwanted text from input. It supports customization options and can return the results in plain text, XML, or JSON formats.

candidates.name: Proxy Checker API
candidates.description: This API provides a service for checking various types of proxies including IPv4, SOCKS5, HTTP, and HTTPS. It evaluates properties such as geo-location, ASN, ISP, type (Datacenter, Residential, Mobile), anonymity, and whether the proxy is static or rotating. Additionally, it offers a free online format converter for proxy data.

candidates.name: ProxyScrape API
candidates.description: The ProxyScrape API provides access to a global proxy server provider, delivering residential, dedicated, and shared datacenter proxies designed for performance. Users can retrieve lists of proxies by specifying requirements such as country and protocol type.

candidates.name: PubliBike Stations API
candidates.description: Provides information about PubliBike stations, their states, positions, and available vehicles. Includes endpoints to get all stations, a specific station with vehicles, and all stations for partners.

candidates.name: Public APIs Database
candidates.description: This API provides a comprehensive collection of free public APIs suitable for students and developers. It features endpoints for various functionalities, allowing users to easily access and integrate multiple services into their applications.

candidates.name: Public Holiday API
candidates.description: An API for public holiday data. Supports over 100 countries. Provides information on holidays and long weekends.

candidates.name: Public Time API
candidates.description: This API provides the current timestamp in various formats, including text, JSON, and CSS custom properties. It supports different endpoints for specific use cases, such as returning UNIX timestamps or sending periodic updates via Server-Sent Events and WebSockets.

candidates.name: QR Code Generator
candidates.description: This API allows users to generate QR codes based on specified data and size. You can customize the output by providing the data to encode and the desired dimensions in pixels.

candidates.name: QuanHau API Docs
candidates.description: This API documentation serves as a comprehensive guide for developers to understand and integrate with the services offered by QuanHau, a fullstack web developer. It includes detailed endpoints, request and response formats, and examples to facilitate ease of use for backend applications.

candidates.name: Quote Retrieval API
candidates.description: This API retrieves quotes based on a specific ID. It allows you to get a random quote or the quote of the day using designated special values.

candidates.name: Quotes API
candidates.description: The Quotes API provides access to a collection of motivational quotes. Users can retrieve all quotes, a random quote, multiple random quotes, or a specific quote by index.

candidates.name: RBF VPN API
candidates.description: This API provides temporary access to services on rbf1.info, allowing developers to interact programmatically with the RBF network. It facilitates various functionalities related to RBF services, enabling effective integration into apps and solutions.

candidates.name: REST API Beispiele
candidates.description: Dieses API bietet Beispiele für REST API Aufrufe, insbesondere für die HTTP Methoden POST, PUT und PATCH. Es dient als Anleitung, um Ressourcen zu erstellen, zu aktualisieren oder zu löschen, wobei ein Beispielservice verwendet wird.

candidates.name: RSQ API
candidates.description: Full stack RESTful API for entity lists, single entity access, and complex query built requests. Public API with versioning and no user authentication.

candidates.name: Radio Basilisk
candidates.description: Radio Basilisk provides daily information and entertainment to 100,000 listeners in the Basel region. This API shows the last played songs on Radio Basilisk.

candidates.name: Radio SRF 1
candidates.description: API providing information about currently played music on Radio SRF 1 including song titles and artists.

candidates.name: Radiorecord API
candidates.description: This API provides a JavaScript library for interacting with radiorecord.ru, allowing users to access charts, tracks, and other resources related to music streaming. It simplifies the integration of radiorecord functionalities into applications, making it easier for developers to use its features.

candidates.name: Railway Station Photos
candidates.description:
OpenData project to collect railway station photos from many countries. More and more countries are added over time. Most photos are CC0 licensed and can be used freely.
The railway stations with their photos can also be viewed on the website https://map.railway-stations.org and in the Android and iOS Apps. These apps also implement the API and can be examined on GitHub: https://github.com/RailwayStations
The full OpenAPI Spec can be found here: https://api.railway-stations.org/openapi.yaml

candidates.name: Real REST API
candidates.description: This API is designed to handle your HTTP requests 24/7 for free, supporting various methods like GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, and PATCH. It is ideal for demo projects, testing, learning, or educational purposes, providing a reliable backend to store and retrieve data.

candidates.name: Real Time Bus Data
candidates.description: This API provides real-time arrival data for Kowloon Motor Bus and Long Win Bus services. It includes routes, stops, and the estimated time of arrival (ETA) for bus services based on live data updates.

candidates.name: Realgazeta API
candidates.description: The Realgazeta API provides access to thoughts, stories, and ideas from the realgazeta.com.ua website. It allows developers to pull content programmatically, enabling integration with various applications and services.

candidates.name: Realtime Weather API
candidates.description: This API provides real-time readings of temperature, humidity, precipitation, and wind conditions across various weather stations in Singapore at intervals of up to one minute. Managed by the National Environment Agency (NEA), it allows users to access detailed weather data for public use.

candidates.name: Red Tide Information
candidates.description: This API provides updated information on red tides sighted in Hong Kong waters, including species and location. It facilitates access to datasets for both commercial and non-commercial use, ensuring transparency and availability of essential environmental data.

candidates.name: Reddit Stocks
candidates.description: Get top 50 stocks discussed on Reddit subeddit - Wallstreetbets

candidates.name: Rejection Reason Generator
candidates.description: This API provides a variety of random rejection and acceptance reasons, offering a creative and sometimes humorous take on the responses one might receive. Users can easily access specific reasons through various endpoints, making it a fun tool for generating feedback.

candidates.name: Remote Jobs API
candidates.description: Remote1stJobs provides a comprehensive JSON and RSS feed system for accessing fresh remote job listings in the UK, Europe, and EMEA. This API is ideal for newsletters, communities, AI agents, and job tools that require structured data of Europe-focused remote roles.

candidates.name: Remote Jobs API/RSS Feed
candidates.description: Description: Discover and integrate a diverse range of remote job listings with Jobicy's public API, RSS, and XML feeds. This API offers the latest remote job opportunities across various industries and regions, making it a valuable resource for developers and businesses looking to enhance their job feed platforms. Supports filters for job region, industry, and keywords to help you target specific job markets.

candidates.name: Remote OK Jobs API
candidates.description: Remote OK is the #1 remote-only jobs board on the web. It has over 30,000+ remote job listings, adding new ones every day. With this API, now you can build apps with our data feed which covers 80% of remote jobs on the web.

candidates.name: Represent Officials API
candidates.description: This API provides access to information about elected officials and electoral districts in Canada. Users can find representatives based on postal codes or geographical coordinates, retrieve boundary sets, and explore details about elections and candidates.

candidates.name: Republicmag API
candidates.description: This API provides access to republicmag.io, an independent Russian-language publication that offers analytics, news, and commentary on politics, economics, society, and culture. Users can retrieve recent posts and other relevant content through this interface.

candidates.name: Ron Swanson Quotes API
candidates.description: This API provides a simple way to retrieve quotes from Ron Swanson, a character from the television show Parks and Recreation. It supports different endpoints to fetch a single quote, multiple quotes, or to search for quotes containing specific terms.

candidates.name: RuntimeBuzz Article API
candidates.description: The RuntimeBuzz API allows users to search for articles across various categories such as software, hardware, and AI using specific queries. It returns detailed information including titles, excerpts, and URLs of the articles in a structured JSON format.

candidates.name: SLA Uptime Calculator
candidates.description: The SLA Uptime Calculator API provides calculations for expected downtime based on specified uptime percentages. It supports both simple and complex calculations, allowing users to input downtime durations and receive corresponding SLA uptime percentages. Additionally, it can calculate acceptable downtime for different days of the week.

candidates.name: SXP VPN API
candidates.description: The SXP VPN API provides a mobile solution for secure and private internet access. It allows users to connect to a global network, ensuring browsing privacy and security. Users can access server lists and manage their VPN connections efficiently through this API.

candidates.name: Satellite TLE Data
candidates.description: This API provides access to Two-Line Element (TLE) data for various satellites. It allows users to retrieve the latest orbital information for tracking satellites in real-time.

candidates.name: Screenshot API
candidates.description: Capture any URL as a screenshot in PNG or JPEG format with a simple HTTP request. This API supports mobile emulation, dark mode, and full-page capture without needing a headless browser setup. It offers a free tier for limited usage and a pro option for increased limits.

candidates.name: Search Notice API
candidates.description: This API allows users to search for specific notice slips within a given database. It provides information regarding the results of search queries, indicating if there are matching slips or not.

candidates.name: Sepomex
candidates.description: REST API mapping current zip codes in Mexico, provides CSV or Excel files from official site.

candidates.name: Setup Gear Guide API
candidates.description: The Setup Gear Guide API provides a keyless interface for accessing a comprehensive catalog of products, including detailed specifications and compatibility checks. Users can generate build quotes, receive product recommendations, compare products, and check compatibility across various categories in a structured format.

candidates.name: Shame as a Service
candidates.description: A simple NestJS API that delivers country-specific shame messages. Perfect for adding a bit of humor to your applications or motivating your team with culturally-aware shame quotes.

candidates.name: Shikhar Mobile API
candidates.description: This API enables users to interact with the Shikhar mobile application, allowing actions such as user login, mobile number verification, and other app-related functionalities. It's designed to facilitate seamless communication between the mobile client and the server.

candidates.name: Shikimori API
candidates.description: The Shikimori API provides access to various data related to anime, manga, and user interactions on the Shikimori platform. It allows developers to fetch information about animes, mangas, characters, users, and more, while using OAuth2 for authentication.

candidates.name: Shodan EntityDB API
candidates.description: The Shodan EntityDB API provides fast lookups for business entities, offering a centralized repository of financial overviews and executive information for entities listed in the US. Access critical financial metrics, analyze performance, and explore leadership teams to make informed investment decisions, conduct industry research, and connect with key decision-makers.

candidates.name: Short Link API
candidates.description: This API provides a simple interface for shortening URLs using GET requests. Users can quickly generate short links for their long URLs and receive a JSON response containing the shortened link.

candidates.name: Simpsons Character API
candidates.description: The Simpsons Character API provides detailed information about characters from The Simpsons universe, including their age, occupation, and famous quotes. It's designed for developers who want to create applications or services related to The Simpsons series.

candidates.name: Single-use Key Registry
candidates.description: Blooms is a public API that allows users to register and check single-use keys for serverless apps, browser extensions, and software. Keys are hashed locally to ensure privacy, and no raw values are transmitted to the server, enabling secure key management without the need for a database.

candidates.name: Sodeom AI Proxy
candidates.description: This API serves as a proxy to an OpenAI-compatible API utilizing GitHub Models. It allows users to send queries or chat history and receive generated text responses, ensuring privacy and no tracking.

candidates.name: Sodeom Search API
candidates.description: The Sodeom Search API enables users to perform private searches without any tracking, returning results in a structured JSON format. It supports pagination and allows users to query using specific search terms.

candidates.name: SoftVPN Mobile API
candidates.description: This API provides access to the SoftVPN mobile application, offering functionalities such as retrieving a list of VPN servers. It is designed for developers looking to integrate SoftVPN features into their applications quickly and effectively.

candidates.name: SotaProject API
candidates.description: This API provides access to the functionalities of sotaproject.com, aiming to serve as a robust media platform. It allows users to retrieve publications, manage categories, and interact with various media contents.

candidates.name: SpaceX REST API
candidates.description: Open Source REST API for launch, rocket, core, capsule, starlink, launchpad, and landing pad data.

candidates.name: Spider-Man Movies API
candidates.description: This API provides information about various Spider-Man movies, including titles, release years, and actor details. Users can access movie rankings and official IMDb links for more information.

candidates.name: Stadt Land Fluss
candidates.description: Compact solution for Stadt Land Fluss in German

candidates.name: Star Trek API
candidates.description: STAPI is the first public REST API dedicated to all things Star Trek. It provides access to a comprehensive read-only model that includes characters, species, episodes, spacecraft, and much more, making it invaluable for fans and developers alike.

candidates.name: Star Wars Databank API
candidates.description: The Star Wars Databank API provides access to a comprehensive collection of data related to the Star Wars universe including characters, droids, creatures, locations, organizations, species, and vehicles. It is a RESTful API that presents official information derived directly from the Star Wars Databank, allowing users to explore and interact with the vast lore of the saga.

candidates.name: Stephen King API
candidates.description: Provides access to Stephen King books, shorts stories, and villains. Retrieve information by ID.

candidates.name: Stitch AI Design
candidates.description: Stitch is an API that generates user interfaces for mobile and web applications, streamlining the design process. It leverages artificial intelligence to assist designers in quickly ideating and creating layouts, making design both fast and efficient.

candidates.name: Stoicism Quote API
candidates.description: This API generates stoicism quotes to help you live a better life using Stoicism wisdom.

candidates.name: Strictly Better API
candidates.description: This API allows users to retrieve and search for obsolete cards in JSON format. Users can also find functional reprints and access various endpoints with a limit on the number of results per request.

candidates.name: Sumo API
candidates.description: Free API for accessing sumo database including rikishi, basho, banzuke, torikumi, hoshitori, matches, and more. Explore sumo data, learn about sumo history, and check match results.

candidates.name: Svoboda Web API
candidates.description: This API provides access to various features of svoboda.org, enabling users to interact with content and services related to uncensored news and responsible discourse. It supports functionalities such as fetching live highlights and other project-related data.

candidates.name: Swiss Federal Railways (SBB)
candidates.description: This API provides departure, delay, and cancellation data from the Swiss Federal Railways (SBB) for the previous day. It compares scheduled (soll) vs. actual (ist) operations.

candidates.name: T-Rex VPN API
candidates.description: The T-Rex VPN API allows developers to integrate VPN functionalities into their applications, enabling connections with military-grade encryption for enhanced privacy. Users can access content securely and enjoy unlimited bandwidth across more than 50 countries, ensuring a high-speed and reliable internet experience.

candidates.name: TVP API
candidates.description: The TVP API provides access to information about programs, TV schedules, and details about shows and TV stars on the official Polish Television website. Users can retrieve content information and related data programmatically.

candidates.name: TVmaze API
candidates.description: Add television information to your own website or app with a fast and clean TV API. Add schedules, show, episode, cast information, ...

candidates.name: Tarot Card Meanings
candidates.description: Card names, descriptions, and divinatory meanings based on AE Waite's Pictorial Key to the Tarot (1910) for the Rider-Waite-Smith deck. Access via REST API with endpoints for getting cards and documentation.

candidates.name: TechVPN API
candidates.description: The TechVPN API provides access to functionalities of the techvpn.cloud VPN browser extension, allowing users to connect swiftly without the need for accounts, ads, or data collection. It offers features based on the WireGuard protocol for secure and fast VPN connections.

candidates.name: Teehee Joke API
candidates.description: The Teehee.dev API provides a simple way to retrieve random jokes curated by Jesse G. Donat. Users can make a GET request to receive a joke along with its ID, question, answer, and a permalink for reference.

candidates.name: Telegram Bot API
candidates.description: The Bot API is an HTTP-based interface created for developers keen on building bots for Telegram.

candidates.name: Telegram Mailing Service
candidates.description: This API allows users to create, manage, and track mailing lists within the Telegram platform. It provides endpoints to create new mailings, check their status, and cancel existing mailings.

candidates.name: Temp Mail API
candidates.description: The Temp Mail API allows developers to programmatically create disposable email addresses for enhanced privacy and testing. Users can send and receive messages without revealing their real email addresses, making it an ideal solution for protecting personal information and automating processes.

candidates.name: Temporary Email API
candidates.description: The Temporary Email API provides users with a way to generate temporary email addresses for secure and anonymous communication. Users can create, check, and manage temporary email addresses, allowing for the receipt of emails without exposing their actual email address.

candidates.name: Temporary Email Service
candidates.description: This API allows users to generate temporary email addresses for receiving emails anonymously. It helps in protecting user privacy while signing up for online services without exposing personal email accounts.

candidates.name: Text Validation API
candidates.description: This API checks if the provided text parameters are valid and not empty. It returns an error message if the text is missing, ensuring that users provide necessary input.

candidates.name: The Cat API
candidates.description: Get random images of cats

candidates.name: The Color API
candidates.description:
Your fast, modern, swiss army knife for color.
Pass in any valid color and get conversion into any other format, the name of the color, placeholder images and a multitude of schemes.

There are only two endpoints you need to worry about, /id and /scheme, and you can read the docs about both. Each endpoint is available in JSON[P], HTML & SVG format. The SVG format can be saved or used as an img[src] attribute for super-easy embedding/sharing!

candidates.name: The Office API
candidates.description: This API provides access to detailed information regarding the popular television show 'The Office.' Users can retrieve data about seasons, characters, and episodes, including air dates and descriptions. The API is currently in early development, indicating that features may evolve over time.

candidates.name: The Rosary Api
candidates.description: Provides various endpoints to access rosary prayers for different days and occasions in JSON format. No authentication required for usage.

candidates.name: Throwaway Email API
candidates.description: The Throwaway Email API allows users to check if an email address is from a disposable domain. It provides endpoints to search by domain name or email address. This service is useful for validating and filtering unwanted temporary emails.

candidates.name: Thurgau Population Data
candidates.description: API providing data on the permanent population of the Thurgau canton since 2007. Includes information on residents with main residence in Thurgau and specific considerations for foreign population.

candidates.name: TikTok Engagement Bot
candidates.description: The Zefoy API allows users to automate interactions on TikTok, providing tools for gaining likes, followers, shares, and views quickly. It is designed to help increase engagement metrics for TikTok accounts through bot-managed activities, making it a useful resource for users looking to boost their social media presence on the platform.

candidates.name: Top News API
candidates.description: This API provides the top news articles from a specified country in a specific language for a given date. The news articles are aggregated from multiple sources, and the ranking is based on the number of sources represented in each cluster.

candidates.name: Translate Funny Languages
candidates.description: Translate english to funny languages like Morse Code, Sith or Valyrian

candidates.name: Transport API
candidates.description: Swiss public transport API with endpoints for locations, connections, and stationboard

candidates.name: Trivia API
candidates.description: The Open Trivia Database provides a completely free JSON API for use in programming projects. Use of this API does not require a API Key, just generate the URL below use it in your own application to retrieve trivia questions.

candidates.name: Truth or Dare API
candidates.description: API for truth, dare, would you rather, never have I ever, and paranoia questions with different ratings available.

candidates.name: USPTO API Catalog
candidates.description: The USPTO API Catalog provides developers with access to various APIs related to intellectual property. It includes information about registering, searching, and managing patents and trademarks, allowing for easy integration of government data into applications.

candidates.name: UUID Generator API
candidates.description: The UUID Generator API allows you to generate unique UUIDs and GUIDs easily via HTTP requests. It supports multiple versions, including version 1, 3, 4, and 5, and can produce them in bulk formats for efficient testing and development purposes.

candidates.name: UV Index API
candidates.description: The UV Index API provides real-time data on ultraviolet index levels for various locations in Singapore. Users can retrieve the latest UV index information updated every hour between 7 AM and 7 PM. The API allows for filtering by date or datetime via query parameters.

candidates.name: UniRate API
candidates.description: API for currency conversion and exchange rates. It provides endpoints to convert currencies, list available currencies, and retrieve current exchange rates for various currencies.

candidates.name: Unix Converter API
candidates.description: The Unix Converter API allows users to convert between various Unix time formats and human-readable date formats. It provides easy methods for timestamp conversion, time zone adjustments, and date formatting, catering to developers in need of Unix time manipulations.

candidates.name: Unshorten.me API
candidates.description: Provides an easy method to unshorten a wide range of shortened URLs with rate limit and authorization header. Returns unshortened URL and success status.

candidates.name: Unsolicited Advice API
candidates.description: This API provides access to a collection of unsolicited advice from Kevin Kelly. Users can retrieve random advice, all available advice, or specific advice based on its ID.

candidates.name: User Agent Lookup API
candidates.description: This API allows users to parse and retrieve information about user agents for free. It has no limitations or rate limiting, enabling unlimited requests by simply calling the appropriate endpoint with the user agent string.

candidates.name: User Data Scraper
candidates.description: This API allows users to scrape and retrieve user data from various online sources. It gathers a wide range of user information including names, addresses, phone numbers, and more, which can be utilized for various applications and analytics.

candidates.name: UserAgent Parser API
candidates.description: This API parses user agent strings, providing structured information about the client's browser, operating system, and device type. Users can retrieve detailed data by submitting their user agent string along with an API key.

candidates.name: UserCheck API
candidates.description: The UserCheck API allows you to verify the validity of a domain by sending a simple GET request to the domain endpoint. It provides responses indicating whether the domain is valid, invalid, or if rate limits have been exceeded.

candidates.name: V.gd API
candidates.description: The V.gd API provides a simple interface for shortening URLs through its JavaScript library. It allows developers to create custom short links, track their usage, and integrate URL shortening capabilities into their applications.

candidates.name: Valorant API
candidates.description: The Valorant API provides extensive data related to in-game items, assets, and other game features, sourced directly from the Valorant game files. This API automatically updates with each game patch, ensuring accurate and up-to-date information for developers and fans alike.

candidates.name: Vdraw API
candidates.description: The Vdraw API provides tools for generating funny content suitable for social media. It allows users to create unique usernames and includes features tailored for enhancing social media interactions.

candidates.name: Virenmonitoring API
candidates.description: Provides data on RNA copies of specified viruses in the wastewater of ARA Basel, along with corresponding case numbers. Data is updated weekly and includes information on SARS-CoV-2, RSV, Influenza A, and Influenza B.

candidates.name: Visitor Frequencies  Lucerne (CH)
candidates.description: Live visitor frequencies in public spaces in Lucerne, Switzerland.

candidates.name: Visitor Statistics API
candidates.description: This API provides access to data regarding visitor arrivals in Hong Kong by country and region of residence. Users can retrieve this data in various formats including JSON, CSV, and XLSX for analysis and reporting purposes.

candidates.name: Vogelwarte Schweiz
candidates.description: Reverse-Engineered Vogel-Datenbank der Schweiz mit verschiedenen Endpoints

candidates.name: Wahlumfragen Datenbank API
candidates.description: Die API von DAWUM stellt eine umfassende Datenbank für Wahlumfragen als JSON-Datei zur Verfügung. Sie ermöglicht den Zugriff auf aktuelle Umfrageergebnisse für verschiedene politische Parteien in Deutschland unter der Lizenz ODC-ODbL.

candidates.name: Waifu API
candidates.description: The API for your Waifu content. Access thousands of categorized anime illustrations via our robust REST API or browse freely.

candidates.name: Waifu Finder API
candidates.description: This API allows users to generate and explore anime-style images with simple queries. With just a click, users can view images in full size and access detailed information about each image.

candidates.name: Water Quality Archive
candidates.description: The Water Quality Archive provides comprehensive data on water quality measurements from various sampling points across England including coastal, river, lake, and groundwater sources. It supports compliance assessment, pollution investigation, and environmental monitoring with data available dating back to 2000.

candidates.name: Wayback Machine API
candidates.description: The Wayback Machine API enables developers to check if a specific URL has been archived and is accessible in the Wayback Machine. It provides a simple interface to retrieve information about archived snapshots of web pages, including the ability to specify timestamps for historical captures.

candidates.name: Weather API
candidates.description: A RESTful API to check the current weather by providing city names as parameters. It offers functionalities to get temperature, wind speed, and a weather description in a simple JSON format.

candidates.name: Weather Data API
candidates.description: WeatherXu provides comprehensive weather data through a simple JSON-based REST API. Users can access current conditions, hourly forecasts, and 10-day predictions for any location worldwide, ensuring reliability and accuracy.

candidates.name: Weather Forecast API
candidates.description: This API provides real-time weather data, including temperature, humidity, and forecasts for various locations. Users can access detailed meteorological information to integrate into their applications.

candidates.name: Web Page to Markdown
candidates.description: This API converts web pages into Markdown format. Users can provide a URL, and the service retrieves the webpage content, formatting it as Markdown for easier readability and integration in Markdown-compatible systems.

candidates.name: Website Analysis APIs
candidates.description: This suite of six free REST APIs provides tools for analyzing websites, including dead link checking, SEO audits, screenshot capturing, performance measurement, tech stack detection, and SSL certificate verification. Each API returns JSON responses without requiring an API key for basic usage.

candidates.name: Website Carbon API
candidates.description: Calculates website carbon emissions per page view using real-time tests. Provides endpoints for testing and manual calculations.

candidates.name: Welt News API
candidates.description: The Welt News API provides access to live news articles, comments, live ticker updates, videos, and streams from welt.de. Users can retrieve the latest news across various topics including politics, economy, culture, and sports.

candidates.name: Woody API
candidates.description: Provides access to random woody images and information through a REST API.

candidates.name: World Bank Data API
candidates.description: The World Bank Data API provides access to a wide array of economic, financial, and social data from over 200 countries. It allows developers to integrate World Bank datasets into their applications and services, facilitating data-driven decision-making for research and policy development.

candidates.name: World Cup Qualification
candidates.description: This API provides detailed information about the qualification process for the FIFA World Cup for different confederations around the world. It includes tournament structures, match schedules, and results for qualifying matches.

candidates.name: World Time API
candidates.description: Simple JSON/plain-text API to obtain the current time in, and related data about, a timezone.

candidates.name: World Wonders
candidates.description: Free and open source API providing information about world wonders

candidates.name: Xeno-canto API
candidates.description: API for accessing bird and wildlife sounds from around the world. Provides a RESTful JSON-based interface to search for and retrieve recordings of various species.

candidates.name: YAML Yugi
candidates.description: API providing a comprehensive, machine-readable database of Yu-Gi-Oh! Trading Card Game, Official Card Game, Master Duel, Rush Duel, and Speed Duel. It supports fetching individual cards in JSON or YAML format, and integrates with Discord bot Bastion. Aggregations and card data are published on GitHub Pages.

candidates.name: Yadore Publisher API
candidates.description: The Yadore Publisher API provides endpoints for accessing product offers, deeplinks, and smartlinks from various merchants. It supports functionalities such as searching for offers, retrieving lists of active merchants, and obtaining conversion reports. The API requires an API key for authentication and provides detailed documentation for implementation.

candidates.name: Yagla URL Shortener
candidates.description: Yagla is a simple and free tool provided by Vitamin.tools that allows users to shorten long URLs easily. It serves as a web API for generating shorter links, enabling better link management and sharing. Perfect for those looking to simplify sharing lengthy web addresses.

candidates.name: Yahoo Finance API
candidates.description: Yahoo finance API to access current and historical crypto and finance data.

candidates.name: Yande.re API v2
candidates.description: Version 2 API for /post that returns responses in json only. Provides additional information over the standard API with features like tag searches, limiting responses, including tag types, votes, and pool membership.

candidates.name: Yes-as-a-Service
candidates.description: This API provides random, creative, and amusing affirmations in JSON format, allowing users to receive positive responses for various scenarios. It is perfect for applications requiring a light-hearted and engaging way to express agreement or positivity.

candidates.name: Yo Mama API
candidates.description: API for retrieving jokes by random, category, or list based on Yo Mama jokes. No authentication required.

candidates.name: YouTube Video API
candidates.description: This API provides data related to YouTube videos, including details such as views, upload date, duration, and descriptions. It allows developers to fetch comprehensive information about specific videos from the platform.

candidates.name: Yugi Limit Regulation API
candidates.description: The API provides access to the Yu-Gi-Oh! Forbidden and Limited Lists, also known as banlists, in a JSON format. It includes lists for various formats such as the Trading Card Game (TCG), Official Card Game (OCG), Master Duel, and Rush Duel.

candidates.name: YummyAnime API
candidates.description: The YummyAnime API is a JavaScript library designed for accessing and interacting with the yummyani.me platform. It allows developers to search for anime content and retrieve detailed information about various anime titles.

candidates.name: Zippopotamus Zip Code API
candidates.description: The Zippopotamus API provides postal and zip code data for over 60 countries, allowing users to easily access detailed location information. It is particularly useful for form auto-completion and supports JSON response format for seamless integration.

candidates.name: ai-cats API
candidates.description: The ai-cats API provides access to various functionalities related to AI and cat management, offering features such as training, health monitoring, and interaction tracking. Users can utilize this API to integrate intelligent cat care solutions into their applications.

candidates.name: eLife Sciences API
candidates.description: The eLife Sciences API provides access to various resources related to scientific articles, annotations, reports, and more. It allows users to retrieve, search, and manage scholarly content, emphasizing open access and public data sharing.

candidates.name: iAM Smart API
candidates.description: The iAM Smart API provides information about registration locations for the iAM Smart service, which facilitates digital identity verification in Hong Kong. It delivers data regarding service counters, mobile registration points, and self-registration kiosks for users.

candidates.name: openFDA API
candidates.description: openFDA provides access to a variety of public data related to FDA-regulated products. It offers APIs for searching FDA data for drugs, devices, food, and other relevant categories crucial for healthcare decisions and research.

candidates.name: osu! beatmap API
candidates.description: Search, discover, and download osu! beatmaps effortlessly.

candidates.name: sharedmobility.ch API
candidates.description: Access sharedmobility.ch data via RESTful API with endpoints for attributes, find, identify, providers, and regions.

candidates.name: temp mail api by boomlify
candidates.description:
Boomlify is a powerful temporary email service that goes beyond ordinary temp mail tools. It offers unlimited free temporary emails, custom domain support, and a free Temp Mail API, making it perfect for individuals, developers, and businesses who want full control over email creation and management.

With Boomlify’s API, you can automate the creation and management of temporary emails, integrate them into apps or websites, and handle email workflows efficiently—all without restrictions. Its custom domain feature allows users to generate temp emails under their own domain or choose from Boomlify’s domains, offering complete flexibility and professionalism.

Boomlify also provides a centralized dashboard that’s modern, clean, and intuitive. From here, users can manage all their temporary emails in one place. Features like smart inbox previews allow you to view emails instantly without opening multiple tabs, helping you quickly spot verification links, codes, or messages.

Key Features:

Unlimited Free Temporary Emails – Generate as many temp emails as needed with no hidden limits.

Custom Domain Support – Use your own domain or Boomlify’s service domains for your temporary emails.

Free Temp Mail API – Automate email creation, inbox monitoring, and integration for apps or projects.

Centralized Dashboard – Manage all emails in one place with a modern, user-friendly interface.

Smart Inbox Preview – Quickly check email content without opening full messages.

Extended Expiry Options – Emails can last from 10 minutes to months, according to your needs.

Privacy & Security – Protect your real email from spam, phishing, or unwanted subscriptions.

Cross-Device Access – Access your temporary emails anywhere, anytime.

api docs: https://boomlify.com/en/temp-mail-api-docs

Boomlify is designed to maximize convenience, privacy, and control while providing advanced tools for power users and developers alike.

candidates.name: u.to Link Shortener
candidates.description: The u.to API provides a simple and efficient way to shorten any URL into a concise link. It enables users to create short links with minimal latency, improving the sharing experience.

candidates.name: 国会会議録検索API
candidates.description: 国会会議録検索システムに登録されているデータを検索するためのAPIです。HTTPのGETメソッドを使用して、指定された条件で会議録や発言情報をXMLまたはJSON形式で取得できます。検索結果は、会議開催日の新しい順にソートされます。

candidates.name: CTP API
candidates.description: The CTP API provides integration methods for connecting the functionality and content of the Chinese Text Project with external web applications. It consists of a Plugin API for adding external tools and a JSON API for leveraging CTP features externally.

candidates.name: CheapShark API
candidates.description: CheapShark is a price comparison website for digital PC Games, tracking prices across multiple stores including Steam, GreenManGaming, and Fanatical. The API provides developers with access to CheapShark pricing data to integrate into their own applications or websites.

candidates.name: Chuck Norris Jokes API
candidates.description: A free JSON API for hand curated Chuck Norris facts, including random jokes and categories. Also offers Slack integration and Facebook Messenger support.

candidates.name: CityBikes API
candidates.description: API for accessing CityBikes data including network information, station details, and field filtering.

candidates.name: Coffee
candidates.description: Basic list of descriptions and ingredients for popular coffee drinks

candidates.name: Data.gov.au API
candidates.description: The Data.gov.au API provides programmatic access to datasets published by the Australian government. It allows users to search, filter, and retrieve detailed information about datasets, including metadata and download options.

candidates.name: Dungeons and Dragons API
candidates.description: This API provides access to the 5th Edition Dungeons and Dragons System Reference Document (SRD). It allows developers to retrieve information about spells, classes, monsters, and other game elements through a modern RESTful interface.

candidates.name: Earthquake Catalog API
candidates.description: This API allows users to perform custom searches for earthquake information based on various parameters, such as location, time, and magnitude. It adheres to the FDSN Event Web Service Specifications, providing a structured way to access earthquake data.

candidates.name: Energy-Charts API
candidates.description: Provides access to energy data. Allows users to retrieve and analyze energy consumption information.

candidates.name: Exchange Rate API
candidates.description: ExchangeRate-API provides a free and open-access API for real-time currency conversion and exchange rate data without the need for an API key. It supports various currency pairs and allows users to obtain current and historical exchange rates for personal or commercial use, subject to terms of attribution and rate limits.

candidates.name: Free Dictionary API
candidates.description: The Free Dictionary API provides access to dictionary data sourced from Wiktionary. It allows users to retrieve definitions, pronunciations, synonyms, antonyms, and translations for words in various languages without requiring an API key.

candidates.name: Free Games API
candidates.description: The GamerPower API provides access to a vast collection of free games, in-game loot, and ongoing giveaways without any restrictions or the need for authentication. Users can retrieve giveaway data through simple HTTP GET requests, making integration easy and seamless for developers and gamers alike.

candidates.name: Free Public APIs API
candidates.description: FreePublicAPIs now has a free public API! The Free Public APIs API provides up-to-date information on every free public API listed on freepublicapis.com. Perfect for developers, students and hobbyists. It is limited to 1000 requests a day, if you need more, feel free to reach out. Also if you build something with this API, make sure to add it as a showcase project here.

candidates.name: Free-To-Play Games
candidates.description: The Free-To-Play Games Database API offers programmatic access to a comprehensive collection of the best free games available. Users can retrieve detailed information about various games, including genres, developers, and release dates, without any restrictions or authentication required.

candidates.name: GBIF API
candidates.description: The GBIF API provides a programmatic interface to query and publish biodiversity data on GBIF.org, enabling advanced queries not supported by the website. Users can integrate GBIF data into scripts, workflows, or analyses, ensuring reliable and automated results.

candidates.name: HealthCare.gov Content API
candidates.description: The HealthCare.gov Content API provides developers with access to educational content and resources related to the Health Insurance Marketplace in JSON format. This allows applications and websites to integrate and display up-to-date information directly from HealthCare.gov, supporting open data and accessibility for all users.

candidates.name: IP Address Lookup API
candidates.description: The IPSB API allows you to perform IP address lookups for both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses. It provides detailed information such as location, ISP, and other related data for any given IP address.

candidates.name: IP Geolocation API
candidates.description: Comprehensive IP address intelligence API providing geolocation, security analysis, and network information. Features include real-time IP geolocation, advanced threat detection, VPN detection, email validation, and risk scoring for fraud prevention.

candidates.name: IP Geolocation API
candidates.description: The IP2Location API provides a RESTful interface for determining the geographical location of users based on their IP addresses in real time. candidates.name: IP Geolocation API
candidates.description: Country is an open-source API that determines the user's country based on their IP address. It supports both IPv4 and IPv6, making it a versatile tool for geolocation without requiring any API keys or imposing usage limits.

candidates.name: IP Geolocation API
candidates.description: This API allows users to retrieve geolocation information from an IP address or domain name. It provides details such as country, city, region, latitude, longitude, and more in a JSON format without requiring an API key.

candidates.name: IP Intelligence API
candidates.description: IPQuery provides a straightforward API for IP intelligence, allowing developers to retrieve geolocation and other information based on IP addresses. It features a free tier and does not require an API key, making it easy to integrate into applications.

candidates.name: Is Even API

candidates.name: Kimi Quotes API

candidates.name: Magic: The Gathering
